steps.title: Use the final conclusion
steps.content: La Paz respondents reported higher park use than Fortaleza respondents, even though La Paz residents were less likely to live within a 10-minute walk of a park. The text directly concludes that greater proximity alone cannot explain the difference.

steps.title: Reject unsupported claims
steps.content: A introduces researcher expectations, B introduces source dates, and C questions the survey's accuracy. None of those points appears in the text. The supported point is that proximity is not the cause by itself. The answer is D.
